title: Gemstones
description: New gemstones, each with unique custom abilities inspired by popular the popular BlissSMP
body:
## The mod adds:
# Gems:
## Gem Randomizer
 - Can be crafted with 4 diamond blocks, 4 netherite ingots and a netherstar

 - Randomizes your Gem when right clicked (except Dragon Gem)

 - Players can only use one Gem at a time
##Options (/Gemstones)
- First Ability Cooldown Time
- Second Ability Cooldown Time
- Require a gem to use the Gem Randomizer
- Get a new Gem after Death
- Get the same Gem after Death
## Strength Gem
 - First ability: Gives Strength 3 for 15 seconds, Resistance 1 for 30 seconds and Speed 1 

 - Second ability: Shoots a fireball just like a ghast

## Health Gem
 - Can be obtained through the Gem Randomizer

 - First ability: Gives Health Boost 5 for 30 seconds, Instant Health 6 for 0.05 seconds, Regeneration 2 for 30 seconds and Speed 1 for 30 seconds

 - Second ability: Increases your knockback heavily

## Resistance Gem
 - Can be obtained through the Gem Randomizer

 - First Ability: Gives Invisibility 1 for 1 minute, Speed 2 for 30 seconds and resistance 4 for 20 seconds

 - Second ability: Spawns an iron golem that doesn't attack you

## Mining Gem
 - Can be obtained through the Gem Randomizer

 - First Ability: Gives Haste 4 for 1 minute, Speed 2 for 30 seconds and Regeneration 2 for 30 seconds

 - Second ability: Sets your scale to 0.5 block height for 30 seconds

## Trading Gem
 - Can be obtained through the Gem Randomizer

 - First ability: Gives Hero of the Village 4 for 1 minute, Speed 2 for 30 seconds, Haste 1 for 30 seconds and Saturation 2 for 2 minutes

 - Second ability: Summons a villager

## Travel Gem
 - Can be obtained through the Gem Randomizer

 - First ability: Gives you Dolphins Grace 1 for 1 minute, Jump Boost 2 for 2 minutes, Speed 3 for 2 minutes, Fire Resistance for 2 minutes and Water Breathing for 2 minutes

 - Second ability: Boost you and gives you creative like flight for 20 seconds

## Smash Gem
 - Can be obtained through the Gem Randomizer
  
 - First ability: Gives Health Boost 2 for 30 seconds, Instant Health 2, Speed 1 for 30 seconds and Saturation 1 for 1 minute

 - Second ability: Boosts you sstraight up, if you land on an enemy they get massively damaged.
  
## Dragon Gem
 - Can only be crafted! (with a Dragon Egg)

 - First ability: Gives Health Boost 2 for 30 seconds, Instant Health 2, Speed 2 for 30 seconds, Resistance 2 for 30 seconds, Regeneration 2 for 30 seconds and Strength 2 for 30 seconds

 - Second ability: Shoots a dragon fireball

# Standart Mechanics:
 - All abilities show colored actionbar messages when activated

 - Normal abilities have 5 minute cooldowns (can be changed)

 - Special abilities have 1 minute cooldowns (can be changed)

 - Plays special sounds when activating abilities

 - Shows error messages if you try to use abilities while on cooldown or without a Gem
